DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_IMeshBakerSettingsHolder Interface Reference
Inheritance diagram for DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_IMeshBakerSettingsHolder:

Public Member Functions

MB_IMeshBakerSettings GetMeshBakerSettings ()
 
void GetMeshBakerSettingsAsSerializedProperty (out string propertyName, out UnityEngine.Object targetObj)
 A settings holder could store settings in one of several places. We can't return a SerializedProperty because that would be editor only. Instead we return the parameters needed to construct a serialized property.
 

Member Function Documentation

◆ GetMeshBakerSettings()

MB_IMeshBakerSettings DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_IMeshBakerSettingsHolder.GetMeshBakerSettings ( )

Implemented in DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSettings, and MB3_MeshBakerGrouper.

◆ GetMeshBakerSettingsAsSerializedProperty()

void DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB_IMeshBakerSettingsHolder.GetMeshBakerSettingsAsSerializedProperty ( out string  propertyName,
out UnityEngine.Object  targetObj 
)

A settings holder could store settings in one of several places. We can't return a SerializedProperty because that would be editor only. Instead we return the parameters needed to construct a serialized property.

Implemented in DigitalOpus.MB.Core.MB3_MeshCombinerSettings, and MB3_MeshBakerGrouper.
